_comment: Template for `node scripts/render-handoff.mjs <this>.json`. Copy to <slug>.handoff.json and fill. All fields optional except `client`; omit a section's key to drop it. Inline text supports **bold**, [label](url), and `code`. Real example: bitcoin-manor.handoff.json.
lead: A plain-language **results** paragraph — what was delivered and why it's better.
A second paragraph: honest measured win + that the client **owns every account**.
ownershipIntro: Accounts sit under our setup email so we could build it; transfer is by invite — never a shared password.

accounts.name: Hosting — Netlify
accounts.own: → invite your email as Admin, we step off

editSteps: Sign in to [app.storyblok.com](https://app.storyblok.com) with your email.
Open your space → your story, edit any field, then click **Publish**.

finishingSteps.title: 1 · Auto-publish
finishingSteps.body: Connect repo + build hook + Storyblok webhook so Publish updates the live site in ~1 min.

goingLive.intro: The site is on a free `*.netlify.app` address. To launch on the real domain:
options: Point the domain at the new site in Netlify → Domain management.

notes: **Real photos, your own** — swap any in Storyblok.
**Honest on speed** — we quote the PageSpeed score, not a lab “seconds” figure.
